## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, quality, and publishing processes.](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality calibration ongoing; first article published, more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Targeting mix of high-volume and zero-volume keywords for competitive edge](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Implementing content refresh strategy (5 articles/week) to boost performance](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [New QA processes in place, including manual checks for factual accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Discussing options for publishing cadence and blog organization to balance SEO and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Keyword Strategy

  - [Addressing quality concerns, including factual accuracy (e.g., non-existent plugins)](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Explained rationale for targeting zero-volume keywords:](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [High buying intent](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Potential for future growth](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [50-60% of search queries are new each month/year](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Implementing three-pronged keyword strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
    1.  Zero/low volume
    2.  Strapi's keyword report
    3.  Competitor gap analysis via SEMrush

### Content Publishing and Refresh

  - [First article published; more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Aiming for 10+ new articles and 5 refreshed articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Refresh strategy targets underperforming content:](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Example shared: Client saw 300% increase in impressions for refreshed articles vs. 15% site-wide](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Discussing options for publishing cadence:](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Potentially 2 articles per day](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Considering publishing with past dates (within 2 months)](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Exploring CMS options to separate SEO-focused content from main blog feed](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### SEO and CRO Recommendations

  - [Meta descriptions: 140-160 characters, including high-CTR tactics (e.g., year, "best X")](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [No penalties expected for publishing 5-10 pages per day](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [AI-generated content discussion:](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
      - [Focus on quality over disclosure of AI usage](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
      - [Human-in-the-loop approach with careful QA](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [CRO suggestions:](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [Lead magnets at 70-80% scroll depth](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [Email capture for nurturing sequences](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [Considering chat functionality (e.g., Capata.ai integration)](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)

### Team Collaboration

  - [New team member added for hands-on QA](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Content calendar and topic planning available in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Assigning author names to content based on expertise areas](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [Adding social profiles to author bios for improved E-A-T signals](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue publishing new content, aiming for 10+ articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [Implement refresh strategy for 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Explore CMS options for separating SEO content from main blog feed](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Add social profiles to author bios](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [Consider implementing lead magnets and email capture for nurturing](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [Investigate Capata.ai integration for blog post summarization](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to discuss internal matters (Theo, Maxime, Victor)](https://fathom.video/share/vMppGQm9QDGF_s-5am-7319vxDmbcz1E?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
